prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约13305名，2023年大幅前移至约6668名，2024年继续前移至约5138名，2025年回落至约6161名。近四年整体呈前移趋势，但2025年较2024年后移 约1023名，出现明显回调，2025年基准位次约6161名；该校在宁夏理科/物理类招生计划：2022年58人、2023年59人、2024年62人、2025年61人、2026年62人。2 026年较2025年小幅扩招1人，扩幅约1.6%，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第79-83名区间（20 26年约第80名），属于中上游211院校，层次定位清晰；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要因热门专业投档线暴跌、部分专业无人报考引发关注；2026年周 期延续偏负面评价，涉及学术不端事件通报。抖音热度排名第77位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光度不高。整体声誉信号偏弱，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生一定抑制；第五轮学科评估中，管理科学与工程获评A等级，为该校唯一A级学科，与工商管理类等招生专业直接关联。其余工科专业虽未获A级评级，但电气、机械等传统工科实力 在行业内认可度较高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电气工程及其自动化、计算机科学与技术、电子信息工程等专业社会热度为高热推荐，报考竞争激烈；土木建筑类分化观望，生化 环材类明显劝退。本省2026年考生总数约66000人（含不确定标记），按近年物理类占比约67.5%估算，物理类考生约44550人，与2025年基本持平；合肥工业大学位于安徽省合肥市，距宁夏较远，属跨省招生。该校在宁夏招生人数占全国总招生比例较小（近年约2%-3%），地域偏好对报考影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次回调趋势、2026年招生计划小幅扩招、声誉偏负面信号与热门专业高热度的对冲作用，以及本省考生总数基本稳定，预计2026年最低录取位次 在2025年6161名基础上小幅前移。预测最低位次约6192名，波动区间5692-6692名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 计算机科学与技术
- 电子信息工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 机械设计制造及其自动化
- 光电信息科学与工程
- 环境工程
- 建筑环境与能源应用工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 土木工程（土木、信管双学位）
- 应用化学
- 制药工程
- 食品质量与安全。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间5692-6692名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如5600名以内）可重点冲刺电气、计算机等一档热门专业；位次接近区间上限（如6500名以外）建议以三档专业保底并关注二档中位专业。该校工科实力均衡，建议结合个人兴趣与就业前景综合选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the lowest ranking was approximately 13,305; in 2023, it significantly advanced to about 6,668; in 2024, it continued to advance to about 5,138; in 2025, it fell back to about 6,161. Over the past four years, the overall trend has been advancing, but in 2025, it moved back by about 1,023 positions compared to 2024, showing a clear correction. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 6,161. The university's enrollment plan in Ningxia for science/physics categories: 58 in 2022, 59 in 2023, 62 in 2024, 61 in 2025, and 62 in 2026. In 2026, there is a slight expansion of 1 student compared to 2025, an increase of about 1.6%, which has a limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable in the 79-83 range in recent years (around 80th in 2026), placing it among the upper-middle tier of 211 institutions, with a clear hierarchical positioning. In the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to a sharp drop in admission cutoffs for popular majors and some majors having no applicants, attracting attention. In the 2026 cycle, the negative evaluation continued, involving reports of academic misconduct. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 77th, with a general evaluation, and low exposure on short video platforms. Overall, the reputation signal is relatively weak, which may somewhat suppress some students' willingness to apply. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering was rated A, the only A-level discipline at the university, directly related to enrollment majors such as Business Administration. Although other engineering majors did not receive A-level ratings, traditional engineering fields like Electrical Engineering and Mechanical Engineering have high recognition within the industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science and Technology, and Electronic Information Engineering are highly recommended with intense competition for admission. Civil and architectural majors are in a wait-and-see state, while chemistry, biology, environment, and materials majors are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is about 66,000 (including uncertain markers). Based on the recent physics category proportion of about 67.5%, the estimated number of physics category examinees is about 44,550, roughly the same as in 2025. Hefei University of Technology is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, far from Ningxia, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. The university's enrollment in Ningxia accounts for a small proportion of its total national enrollment (about 2%-3% in recent years), so geographic preference has a neutral impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the correction trend in 2025 rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan, the offsetting effects of negative reputation signals and high popularity of hot majors, and the basic stability of the total number of examinees in the province, it is expected that the lowest admission ranking in 2026 will slightly advance from the 2025 ranking of 6,161. The predicted lowest ranking is about 6,192, with a fluctuation range of 5,692 to 6,692.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Science and Technology
- Electronic Information Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
- Environmental Engineering
- Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Engineering (Civil Engineering, Information Management Dual Degree)
- Applied Chemistry
- Pharmaceutical Engineering
- Food Quality and Safety.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5,692-6,692, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 5,600), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular majors like Electrical Engineering and Computer Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 6,500), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options and pay attention to mid-range Tier 2 majors. The university has balanced engineering strength, so it is suggested to make a comprehensive choice based on personal interests and employment prospects.
